pages.text:
SUID - AFRIKAANSE AMBASSADE

SOUTH

AFRICAN

EMBASSY

AMBASSADE D'AFRIQUE DU SUD

٢• DO٢٩٥٧

75343 PARIS CEDEX 07

TEL. : 45 55 92 37

MINITEL: 3614 - AFSUD

Paris, 1 June 1994

The International Institute of Refrigeration (IIR)

177

Boulevard Malesherbes 75017 paris

Dear Sir,

Re: Termination of membership

The South African Department of Foreign Affairs has been instructed by the Department

of Agriculture

membership of the International Institute of Refrigeration, from

The Agricultural Research Council which currently benifits fro nembership, has proposed that organisations and institutions that might have individually acquire membership of the IIR, at their own expense.

Your cooperation in this regard will be appreciated.

Yours faithfully, gig.

Counselior:

Multilateral and Economic Affairs
